title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at McDonald's India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at McDonald's India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!
